title: Marvell Technology Earnings Report: Key Numbers and Analyst Sentiment
text: Marvell Technology delivered strong earnings results in Q4 FY2026 with eps of $0.80, beating expectations of $0.71. Revenue for the quarter reached $2.22 billion with 22.1% year-over-year growth. The company's data center revenue surpassed $6 billion, growing 46% year-over-year, driven by demand for interconnect, switching, and storage products supporting AI applications. Custom silicon, which creates specialized chips for major cloud providers, doubled year-over-year with strong diversification across top U.S. hyperscalers. Marvell's optical interconnect products, including 800G and 1.6T solutions, represent critical competitive differentiators with expected substantial growth in coming years. The stock experienced an 18.35% surge following the earnings beat and significant guidance raise. Forward guidance for FY2027 revenue approaching $11 billion implies more than 30% year-over-year growth. FY2028 revenue target near $15 billion represents approximately 40% growth.
